aesthetic: Sleek Launcher — dark chrome, vibrant gradients, keyboard-first precision
principles: Dark chrome: #1c1c1e base, layered with subtle gradients
Vibrant accent gradients: red-to-purple for hero moments
Keyboard shortcut aesthetic: monospace labels, precise alignment
Speed-focused copy: short, action-oriented, no fluff
promptGuide: Apply the aesthetic: Bricolage Grotesque display (weight 700), Plus Jakarta Sans body, dark chrome bg #1c1c1e, text #ebebf0, red-to-purple gradient (#ff6363 → #6e56cf) for hero/cover moments, monospace labels for shortcuts/commands, 10px border-radius, subtle inner glow on cards (rgba(255,255,255,0.05)), speed-focused copy: imperative verbs, ≤6 words per headline, no passive voice.
